commands.review_summary:
The PR adds parser-backed exec approval risk hints and highlights through agent approval registration, Gateway schema/events, forwarded messages, view models, Control UI rendering, tests, changelog, and an `.npmrc` registry pin.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main and PR head is enough to reproduce the review findings: compare the current commandAnalysis request payload/test with the PR request payload, then inspect the raw-offset, carrier-detection, and empty-line formatter paths.
commands.review_followup: Draft, maintainer-labeled, merge-dirty PR needs source-branch rebase and maintainer/author fixes rather than a ClawSweeper replacement branch.

target.title: Show exec command risks in approvals
